description: American Bitcoin Corp., a Bitcoin accumulation platform company, focuses on building a Bitcoin infrastructure platform. The company is engaged in the operation of application-specific integrated circuit miners for the purpose of mining Bitcoin and the strategic accumulation of a Bitcoin reserve. The company is based in Miami, Florida. American Bitcoin Corp. operates as a subsidiary of Hut 8 Corp.
